projectDescription: A Velocity proxy plugin that automatically kicks players and invalidates their LimboAuth sessions when their password is changed or reset via the LeaderOS web panel.
keyFeatures: Automatically kicks online players when their password is changed or reset via LeaderOS
Invalidates LimboAuth sessions to prevent unauthorized access after a password change
Asynchronous database polling — zero impact on proxy performance
Configurable check interval for how often the database is queried
Customizable kick message with MiniMessage formatting support
Optional LimboAuth integration (can be disabled for servers not using LimboAuth)
MySQL connection pooling via HikariCP for efficient database access
